title: The True Liberal
content:
The truest Liberal is he
    Who sees the man in each degree,
    Who merit in a churl can prize,
    And baseness in an earl despise,
    Yet censures baseness in a churl,
    And dares find merit in an earl.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Fuller Murray, titled "The True Liberal", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
